name: Creator Profile
description: Public creator page layout with hero, tiers, content feed, and about section. Tab-based navigation.

standard.description: Full creator profile page with hero banner, tabbed navigation for posts, memberships, and about

embed.description: Compact embeddable widget with avatar, subscriber count, and subscribe CTA for external sites

visual_brief: Full-width creator page starting with a storefront hero section (cover image, avatar, creator name, bio, follower count, subscribe CTA). Below the hero, a horizontal tab bar with tabs for Posts, Memberships, About, and Community. The tab content area fills the remaining space — Posts tab shows a content feed, Memberships tab shows tier cards, About tab shows a rich text bio with social links. Embed preset removes the hero and shows a compact card version suitable for embedding on external sites.

responsive.mobile: Hero cover image reduces in height. Tabs become horizontally scrollable. Content feed is single-column full-width.
responsive.tablet: Standard hero proportions. Tabs fit in a single row. Content area has comfortable margins.
responsive.desktop: Full-width hero with generous cover image. Content area centered with max-width constraint. All tabs visible.

composition.Hero: Section(full-width) > [CoverImage + Avatar(large) + CreatorName(heading2) + Bio(text-muted) + Stats + SubscribeCTA(d-interactive)]
